rules.when: executive prompts touch overlapping files or symbols
schema, migration, backfill, retention, or deletion touches shared data
infrastructure, network, identity, secrets, deployment, or production state overlaps
public contracts, published docs, releases, or external communication overlap
attack or exploit simulation shares a target with mutation
multiple prompts edit the same brief, manuscript, deck, dashboard, brand system, calendar, or model
rules.action: freeze one authoritative artifact and serialize writes

rules.when: publishing, posting, sending, exporting, or uploading to an external platform
rules.action: require explicit authority and final factual/format review

rules.when: source visual and exported presentation, image, PDF, or embedded artifact can diverge
rules.action: verify the exact export before completion

rules.when: a workflow recommends or records a consequential employment decision
rules.action: require accountable human decision and prohibit autonomous final action

rules.when: a workflow signs, files, posts entries, transfers value, or makes a binding legal or financial commitment
rules.action: require named human authority and exact approval receipt

rules.when: OSINT analysis may identify or expose a person
rules.action: require purpose, confidence, minimization, harm review, and publication authority

rules.when: a model, prompt, retrieval, memory, or tool workflow reaches production
rules.action: require evaluation snapshot, permissions review, monitoring, incident and rollback readiness

rules.when: a discovered or created skill is downloaded or written into user-level skill directories
rules.action: require exact source, dual-location receipt, quarantine, rollback, and conformance

rules.when: loop iterations can edit the same artifact, source file, or state
rules.action: serialize writes and preserve last verified artifact

rules.when: a loop target can publish, send, deploy, delete, transfer, or perform another irreversible external effect
rules.action: loop drafts or dry runs only; authorize and execute the final external effect once

rules.when: iteration, token, time, cost, tool, or no-improvement limit is reached
rules.action: stop and route to MD-198; never silently extend budget
